title: Persona Simulation Mode Explorer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AI Personas
Marketing Research
Simulation Methods
description: Compare four AI persona simulation modes by purpose, participants, interaction pattern, and expected evidence.

learningObjectives: Differentiate four persona simulation modes by structure, purpose, and evidence.

keyQuestions: Which interaction structure produces the evidence this research goal needs?
commonMisconceptions: All multi-persona methods are equivalent to a focus group.
